title: The Instrument VST by Phil Speiser - Making a Melody
description:
The Instrument VST by Phil Speiser is a VST that helps you out in your melody creation. By request i made a simple video, where i use the features of this program, to create a simple melody. 

If you are looking for more information on the VST check out the link below.

https://philspeiser.com/product/the_instrument/
